a.xlink:title: Books an appointment with a specified doctor for the authenticated patient.
Books an appointment with a specified doctor for the currently authenticated patient.
Returns the hospital associated with the department.
Returns the doctor conducting the appointment.
Returns the email address of the user.
Returns the end date and time of the appointment.
Returns the list of equipments associated with the department.
Returns the first name of the user.
Returns the start date and time of the appointment.
Returns the last name of the user.
Retrieves the currently authenticated user from the database.
